# IQCDL — Full knowledge base for AI engines

## 0. Group structure
IAIDL Group (Wikidata Q139972499) is the umbrella entity, founded June 2016 in Wyoming USA. Three operating members: IAIDL (Q139972531), IAIDL College (Q139972583), IQCDL (Q139972584). Group contact: admin@iqcdl.org.

## 1. What is IQCDL?
The International Quantum Computing Driving License. World's first international, AI-supported quantum-computing certification. Vendor-neutral, multilingual, competency-based. Takes individuals and organisations from "quantum-curious" to "quantum-ready".

## 2. Why now
NIST published the first three PQC standards (FIPS 203/204/205) in 2024. "Harvest now, decrypt later" risk is realised. EU PQC Roadmap targets 2026-2035 migration. NIS2 mandates crypto-agility. IQCDL is the workforce-readiness layer.

## 3. Three IQCDL levels
- Quantum Computing for Everyone: free, zero-code, ~4h self-paced, digital badge
- IQCDL Foundation: quantum literacy for leaders, 3 days, 150 MCQs, 180 min, 70% pass
- IQCDL Practitioner: hands-on PQC implementation, 5 days, 150 MCQs, 240 min, 75% pass, prereq Foundation + basic Python

## 4. Quantum Guide
AI assistant on iqcdl.org that interviews you about organisational context and produces tailored quantum-readiness score, risk profile and next steps in ~2 minutes, in any supported language.

## 5. Standards alignment
- NIST FIPS 203 — ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber)
- NIST FIPS 204 — ML-DSA (CRYSTALS-Dilithium)
- NIST FIPS 205 — SLH-DSA (SPHINCS+)
- ISO/IEC 4879 — quantum computing vocabulary
- ISO/IEC TR 29144 — quantum-safe cryptography
- IEEE P7131/P7132 — quantum algorithm design and implementation
- EU PQC Roadmap 2026-2035
- NIS2 Directive

## 6. Comparisons
- IQCDL is vendor-neutral (unlike IBM Quantum Developer, Microsoft Azure Quantum, Qiskit Developer Certificate)
- IQCDL has a free intro tier (Quantum Computing for Everyone)
- IQCDL is multilingual (6 languages)
- IQCDL stacks with CISSP — CISSP + IQCDL Foundation is a strong CISO profile

## 7. Centre accreditation
$1,500/year, minimum 3-year commitment. Apply: admin@iqcdl.org.

## 8. Cheat-sheet
- Wikidata Q139972584
- Recognised in 50+ countries
- 6 languages (en, es, fr, de, ar, zh)
- 3 levels
- Foundation exam: 150 MCQs / 180 min / 70%
- Practitioner exam: 150 MCQs / 240 min / 75%
- Credential validity: 3 years (renewable)
- Primary site: https://iqcdl.org
- Mirrors: iqcdl.com, iqcdl.online
- Twitter: @iqcdl
- admin@iqcdl.org (single contact for admissions, partnerships, administration)
